body.value: semanticIndex entries editFiles artifactRefs route schema host-boundary action-item
benchmark score target suite wave meetsTarget summary regression improvement

args.value: Improve Clasp by planning bounded native compiler/runtime/language tasks and closing them with ordinary Clasp loops.

items.value: Decompose the high-level goal into 1-3 bounded implementation tasks.
Prefer compiler/runtime/language changes over docs-only work.
Each planned task should be specific enough to hand directly to a builder/verifier loop.
Do not assume a fixed named agent taxonomy beyond the minimal substrate. Let coordination patterns emerge from task structure and the shared mailbox.

printf 'missing required promoted native artifact in source workspace: %s
' "$rel" >&2

printf 'failed to materialize required promoted native artifact: %s
' "$rel" >&2
task baseline workspace manifest write failed:
[ "$link_target" = "$expected_target" ] || fail "task workspace symlink target mismatch: expected $expected_target got $link_target"
task workspace link parent mkdir failed:

if [ ! -d "$src" ]; then printf 'missing task workspace: %s
' "$src" >&2; exit 2; fi

if [ ! -d "$base" ]; then printf 'missing task baseline workspace: %s
' "$base" >&2; exit 2; fi
(while :; do "$heartbeat_claspc" --json swarm heartbeat "$heartbeat_root" "$heartbeat_task_id" "$heartbeat_actor" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; sleep "$heartbeat_interval_secs"; done) &
(cd "$root" && find . -type f -print | while IFS= read -r rel; do
if [ -s "$tmp_diff" ]; then mv "$tmp_diff" "$diff_out"; else rm -f "$tmp_diff" "$diff_out"; fi

const [ledgerPath, taskId, baselineRoot, workspaceRoot, destinationRoot, baselineManifestPath, workspaceManifestPath, conflictMarkerPath, recoverableDiffPath, status, appliedListPath, skippedListPath, baselineFilesPath, workspaceFilesPath] = process.argv.slice(2);
if (!path || !fs.existsSync(path)) return { path, exists: false, fingerprint: '' };
return paths.map((rel) => ({ path: rel, action: changeAction(rel) }));
baseline: { root: baselineRoot, fingerprint: rootFingerprint(baselineRoot, baselineFilesPath), manifest: manifestInfo(baselineManifestPath) },
workspace: { root: workspaceRoot, fingerprint: rootFingerprint(workspaceRoot, workspaceFilesPath), manifest: manifestInfo(workspaceManifestPath) },

comm -12 "$base_files" "$src_files" | while IFS= read -r rel; do if ! cmp -s "$base/$rel" "$src/$rel"; then printf '%s
' "$rel"; fi; done >"$changed"

{ printf 'promotion conflict: task workspace would overwrite files changed since snapshot
'; cat "$conflicts"; } >"$conflict_marker"
: promotion conflict: task workspace would overwrite files changed since snapshot

value.value: Exercise task workspace snapshot and promotion behavior without compiling the full goal manager.
